hrv_time.note: PRV not ECG-HRV; RMSSD/pNN50 are quantization-sensitive at 1 Hz — lead with SDNN/SDANN

irregular_24h.note: irregular-rhythm SCREEN (not a diagnosis): Poincaré SD1/SD2 + pNN70. PRV not ECG — wrist pulse misses P-waves. Discuss with a clinician only if you have symptoms.

brv.note: Breathing-rate variability TREND (within-user only); surface a change only beyond the metric MDC

rmssd_sleep_session.note: sleep-session HRV: mean RMSSD over cleaned 5-min windows.

rmssd_nocturnal.note: robust nocturnal RMSSD = MEDIAN of 48 consecutive 5-min-window RMSSDs (REM/arousal-robust). PRV not ECG-HRV; RMSSD is quantization-sensitive at 1 Hz.

hrv_freq.note: PRV spectrum; HF band quantization-limited at 1 Hz

resting_hr.note: lowest-30-min mean + 1st-percentile; HR=0 excluded as off-skin

hr_dip.note: night-day HR ratio; CV-risk + acute-strain signal

prsa_dc.note: Bauer 2006 PRSA DC; needs a long overnight RR record for mortality-grade stability

prsa_ac.note: Bauer 2006 PRSA AC; needs a long overnight RR record for mortality-grade stability

readiness_composite.note: GLASS-BOX readiness: disclosed weights HRV>RHR>RR>temp, renormalized over present inputs; SWC-gated (meaningful=true). Drivers are definitional within the formula (correction, not inferred cause).

strain.note: headline 0–21 strain = log-squash of raw TRIMP (min(21, ln(trimp+1)/ln(1.5))); wrist-HR estimate

cpc.note: Thomas 2005 CPC via Lomb-Scargle coupling spectrum; HFC=stable NREM, LFC=unstable/apnea-rich. Screen, not diagnosis

rsa.note: HF peak unstable across spectral resolutions (spread 4.768441 br/min) — withheld

cvhr_apnea.note: CVHR/ACAT (Hayano) apnea SCREEN — NOT a diagnosis, NOT an AHI; single-night CVHR has substantial night-to-night variability, interpret as a trend over multiple nights

odi.note: temporarily disabled pending hardware-verified packet decoding

skin_temp.note: relative deviation (z) vs your baseline; raw ADC, no absolute °C

stress.note: Baevsky Stress Index → 0–100; resting autonomic tension (PRV).

spo2.note: temporarily disabled pending hardware-verified packet decoding

activity.note: active minutes (1 Hz ENMO over wake); 1 Hz cannot count steps — true step counts come from live workout streaming

steps.note: real 100 Hz count for streamed time + 1 Hz walking estimate for the rest (1 Hz cannot count steps directly)

calories_total.note: total daily energy: Mifflin BMR floor + active Keytel surplus (HR-flex)

naps.note: no qualifying naps (20 min–3 h) outside the main sleep window

wrist_orientation.note: WRIST orientation during sleep (gravity-tilt). A body-position PROXY, NOT supine/side/prone body position — the wrist moves independently of the torso.
